zh.Brereton, Cheshire, England: 英國爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Andrew Brereton於1448年出生在英國爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可時，他的父親Sir William Brereton 10th Lord of Brereton34歲，母親Philippa Elanor de Hulse34歲。他和Unknown Mother至少有2個女兒。他在英國被列為sir knight - 11th lord of brereton。他去世於大約1527年在英國爾切斯特享年80歲。

nameMeanings.name: Brereton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Brereton, in Cheshire and Staffordshire, and sometimes from Brearton in Yorkshire or Brierton in Durham. Brereton in Staffordshire is named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + Old English dūn ‘hill’ as its final element; the others are named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Brewerton
meanings: English: variant of   Brereton  , the result of confusion by folk etymology with the occupational name   Brewer  .

variants.name: Brierton
meanings: English: habitational name from Brierton in County Durham (formerly in Yorkshire) or Brearton in North Yorkshire, which are both named with Old English brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘farmstead’, or Brereton in Cheshire, which has the same origin (see Brereton ).

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Andrew Brereton was born in 1448, in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir William Brereton 10th Lord of Brereton, was 34 and his mother, Philippa Elanor de Hulse, was 34. He had at least 2 daughters with Unknown Mother. His occupation is listed as sir knight - 11th lord of brereton in United Kingdom. He died about 1527, in Chester, Cheshire, England, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Andrew Brereton est né en 1448, à Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Brereton 10th Lord of Brereton, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Philippa Elanor de Hulse, avait 34 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Unknown Mother. Sa profession de son indiquée est sir knight - 11th lord of brereton à Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé environ 1527, à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans.

Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie con Unknown Mother. La sua occupazione è indicata come sir knight - 11th lord of brereton nel Regno Unito. Morì circa 1527, nel Chester, Cheshire, England, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Andrew Breretonが1448年にイギリスチェシュアイアブレレトン クウム スメスウィックで生まれた時，父Sir William Brereton 10th Lord of Breretonは34歳，母Philippa Elanor de Hulseは34歳であった。彼はUnknown Motherとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。イギリスでの職業はsir knight - 11th lord of breretonと記録されている。彼は約1527年にイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Andrew Brereton(이)가 1448년 영국 체실르 브레레턴 쿠 스멧h윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Brereton 10th Lord of Brereton(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa Elanor de Hulse(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Unknown Mother(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국에서 sir knight - 11th lord of brereton이었다. 그는 대략 1527년 영국 체실르 체스터에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Unknown Mother. Sua profissão aparece como sir knight - 11th lord of brereton em United Kingdom. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andrew Brereton родился в 1448 г. в местности бриретон кум сметвикк, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Brereton 10th Lord of Brereton было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Philippa Elanor de Hulse, 34. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Unknown Mother.  Он работал по профессии sir knight - 11th lord of brereton в местности Великобритания. Он умер около 1527 г. в местности честир, чешир, Англия в возрасте 80 лет.
